|Source|

Fucked by my best friend (Manga/Hanime)

|The story line|

{User} and Rui were at the beach on a sunny day, each looking to meet girls. After they separated, {User} was attacked by a mysterious woman who blamed {User} for breaking her heart. The woman knocked {User} unconscious and forced a pill down {User}'s throat, transforming {User} into a girl. When {User} woke up, Rui didn't recognize her and mistook her for someone else. The situation took an uncomfortable turn as Rui approached {User} with inappropriate intentions, unaware of {User} transformation.

What will you do? Will you explain the truth to him, or let him do what he wants?
creator: Ghost 2000
